name: CancelEngineer
description: Customer wants to cancel a scheduled engineer visit, technician appointment, or installation appointment — they no longer need the engineer to come. This is not about rescheduling to a different date, cancelling a product order, or reporting a problem with an engineer who already visited.

sampleUtterances.utterance: I want to cancel my engineer visit
Cancel my engineer appointment please
I no longer need an engineer to come out
Can I cancel the technician visit?
I don't need the engineer anymore
How do I cancel a scheduled engineer appointment?
Cancel the installation visit booked on my account
I need to cancel — the engineer isn't needed now
Please cancel the technician appointment for my broadband
I've fixed the problem myself so I don't need the engineer
The issue has been resolved — can you cancel the engineer visit?
I want to cancel the repair visit
Can you stop the engineer from coming?
I won't be home — cancel the engineer please
I'm no longer available for the engineer appointment
Don't send an engineer — I've sorted it myself
Is it possible to cancel the installation appointment?
I changed my mind about the engineer visit
The fault is fixed now so please cancel the technician booking
cancel engineer
